mapper.select: SELECT digest, count(*) AS sample_count, sum(exec_time_us) AS total_us, avg(exec_time_us) AS avg_us, max(exec_time_us) AS max_us, max(schema_name) AS schema_name, (array_agg(sql_text ORDER BY collect_time DESC))[1] AS sql_text FROM metric_slow_sql_sample WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collect_time >= #{from} AND collect_time <= #{to} AND digest IS NOT NULL AND sql_text IS NOT NULL GROUP BY digest ORDER BY total_us DESC LIMIT #{limit}
